reviews.review_description: It's not letting me sit playing it, it looks like it standing only

A good game with great graphics, interesting setup, fantastic atmosphere, and solid gameplay. It's an expanded wave shooter with a story and additional elements. I really like the game, except for one thing: the weapon handling. I'm a big fan of archery, but the archery here just doesn't feel right. It's really odd that you control the bow only with the front hand. Games like "In Death Unchained" or "Dungeons Of Eternity" do this much better. The crossbow is also held strangely, and reloading it, as well as the rifle, is quite cumbersome. Perhaps this can still be improved - the game itself has great potential. No updates in a long time, very sad.  2.5 / 5
I really like where this game is heading- interesting progression system with weapons and charms. Also like the Korean story and atmospheric music. I look forward to see how this game develops.

developer_response.body:
We really appreciate your play!
We will develop this game little by little for a long time,
We will rewrite the story of the past of Korea.
Thank you so much for your support.

reviews.review_description: I was pleasantly surprised at what you can do in this game. It isn't just another zombie wave shooter. It has a story, multiple weapons, upgrades, unlockables and much more. A fresh approach into the VR zombie genre with loads more content still to come. https://youtu.be/Z8BqTMGS5-Y
